(Road to Customer & Consumer) marketing network, which will （Road to Customer &Consumer）營銷網
accelerate adaptation to the changing market environment, 絡，將加速適應多變的市場環境、滿足多
meet diverse demands and categories, innovate diversified 樣化的需求和品類，創新多元化消費場
consumption scenarios, and the in-depth development of smart 景，深入發展的智慧零售和新零售平台業
retail and new retail platform businesses will also serve the 務也將更加高效地服務市場。
market more efficiently.

and expressed its full support for the Company’s growth. China 表示將全力支持中國食品的發展。中國食
Foods will focus on building its own brand, accelerating the 品將聚焦自有品牌建設，平台業務加速拓
expansion of platform business, and continuously exploring 展、新興業務不斷探索實踐，幫助中國食
and practicing emerging businesses. This will help China 品進一步提升市場競爭力，積極打造國際
Foods further enhance its market competitiveness, actively 化運營能力，完善系統建設和風險管控，
build international operational capabilities, improve system 實現中國食品的可持續高質量發展。
construction and risk management, so as to achieve sustainable
high-quality development for China Foods.

STATEMENT FROM MANAGING DIRECTOR
董事總經理函件
ZHAN ZAIZHONG
展在中
Dear Shareholders, 尊敬的股東：
– UPHOLDING INTEGRITY AND INNOVATION ——守正創新攀高峰 銳意進
TO REACH NEW HEIGHTS, STRIVING 取啓新篇
FORWARD TO OPEN A NEW CHAPTER
The year 2024 marked an extraordinary chapter in the course 2024年，是中國經濟發展歷程中不平凡
of the economic development of China. Faced with a complex 的一年。面對外部壓力加大、內部困難增
situation of intensifying external pressures and increasing 多的複雜形勢，中國經濟運行總體平穩、
internal challenges, China’s economy maintained overall 穩中有進。居民收入穩步增長，消費信心
stability while making steady progress. The household incomes 逐步恢復，為內需擴張提供了基礎。最終
saw a steady increase, and consumer confidence gradually 消費支出對經濟增長貢獻率達到44.5%。
rebounded, laying the groundwork for the expansion of domestic
demand. Ultimately, consumption expenditure contributed
44.5% to economic growth.
In 2024, China Foods actively responded to changes in the 2024年，中國食品積極應對外部市場變
external market. Facing challenges such as the expansion 化，面對飲料行業品類結構擴張、競爭加
of category structure in the beverage industry, intensified 劇、渠道客戶大幅調整等挑戰，中國食品
competition and significant adjustments among channel 秉持「識變、求變、應變」的戰略思維，積
customers, China Foods adhered to the strategic mindset 極擁抱變革創新，以變治變，變現潛力，
of “recognizing changes, seeking changes and adapting to 以重塑夯實根基，以創新驅動增長，再次
changes”, actively conducted reform and innovation, managed 攀上業績新高峰。
change with change, realized potential, reshaped and solidified
its foundation, and drove growth through innovation, once again
reaching new heights in performance.
12
CCHHIINNAA FFOOOODDSS LLIIMMIITTEEDD AANNNNUUAALL RREEPPOORRTT 22002244

--- p.15 ---
STATEMENT FROM MANAGING DIRECTOR 董事總經理函件
2024: FORGING NEW HEIGHTS WITH 2024年：以重塑鑄就新高峰
RESHAPING
In 2024, in the face of a complex and volatile economic 2024年，面對複雜多變的經濟環境與行
environment and industry competition, China Foods proactively 業競爭，中國食品主動出擊，啓動重塑之
embarked on a journey of transformation, comprehensively 旅，全面覆蓋產品品類、營銷網絡、價值
covering the entire business process including product 鏈、供應平台等業務全流程。
categories, marketing networks, value chains and supply
platforms.
In terms of product category reshaping, the Company 在產品品類重塑方面，公司聚焦汽水、果
focused on two core categories: sparkling drinks and juices, 汁兩大核心品類，鞏固市場領先地位，同
consolidating its market-leading position while accelerating the 時加速拓展即飲茶和即飲咖啡兩大新興
